frontiers.conditional: After the wearer's skill recovers SP, the team gains DMG +16% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

type-50-yinglung.conditional: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 time(s).

bonekrusha.conditional: When the wearer casts a combo skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Bonekrushing Smash that grants the wearer's next battle skill DMG Dealt +30%. Bonekrushing Smash can stack 2 time(s).

tide-surge.conditional: After the wearer applies 2 or more stacks of Arts Infliction on the enemy, the wearer gains Arts DMG Dealt +35% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

qingbo.conditional: When the wearer casts a combo skill, the wearer gains Skill DMG Dealt +20% (for every skill) for 15s. This effect can reach 2 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

mi-security.conditional: After the wearer scores a critical hit, the wearer gains ATK +5% for 5s. This effect can reach 5 stacks. At max stacks, grant an additional Critical Rate +5%. This effect cannot stack.

xiranflow.conditional: Whenever the wearer consumes Electrification or Corrosion, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the Status Level of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving Electric DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +15% for 25s. The number of buff stacks maxes out at 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

hot-work.conditional: After the wearer applies Combustion, the wearer gains Heat DMG +50% for 10s. After the wearer applies Corrosion, the wearer gains Nature DMG +50% for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

lynx.conditional: After the wearer gives HP treatment to an allied target, that target also gains 15% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG for 10s. If the said treatment exceeds the target's Max HP, the target gains 30% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

swordmancer.conditional: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and [10 Stagger]. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

aethertech.conditional: After the wearer applies Vulnerability, the wearer gains Physical DMG +8% for 15s. This effect can reach 4 stacks. If the target already has 4 stack(s) of Vulnerability, the wearer gains an additional Physical DMG +16% for 10s. This effect cannot stack.

pulser-labs.conditional: After the wearer applies Electrification, the wearer gains Electric DMG +50% for 10s. After the wearer applies Solidification, the wearer gains Cryo DMG +50% for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

eternal-xiranite.conditional: After the wearer applies Amp, Protected, Susceptibility, or Weakened, other teammates gain DMG Dealt +16% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

roving-msgr.conditional: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Physical DMG +20%.

aburreys-legacy.conditional: When the wearer casts a battle skill, combo skill, or ultimate, the wearer gains ATK +5% for 15s. The buff from each of the three skill types is unique and does not stack with itself.

armored-msgr.conditional: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, the wearer gains 30% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG.

catastrophe.conditional: The wearer casts a battle skill, the action returns 50 SP. This effect only triggers 1 time per battle.

mordvolt-resistant.conditional: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, Treatment Effect +30%.

mordvolt-insulation.conditional: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Arts DMG +20%.

aic-heavy.conditional: After the wearer defeats an enemy, the wearer restores 100 HP. Effect trigger cooldown: 5s.

aic-light.conditional: After the wearer defeats an enemy, the wearer gains ATK +20 for 5s.
